subcodes.first_line: This is the Day wherein the Beloved lamenteth, saying: "Verily, the Well-Beloved is in manifest tribulation," and He Who conversed with God exclaimeth: "O my Lord!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه ینوح الحبیب و یقول ان المحبوب فی بلاء مبین و الکلیم یقول یا ربی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
